headlines.description: — Even though he's relatively new to the Pittsburgh Steelers, Aaron Rodgers fully understands the Rooney family's connections to the Emerald Isle.
headlines.shortLinkText: Steelers hold on for 24-21 win over Vikings in NFL's first regular-season game in Ireland

headlines.description: — Falcons coach Raheem Morris didn't hesitate when he was asked when he saw something that confirmed his belief in Michael Penix Jr. after last week's disastrous loss to Carolina.
headlines.shortLinkText: Penix and Robinson have career-best days to lead Falcons to 34-27 win over short-handed Commanders

events.name: New Orleans Saints at Buffalo Bills

headlines.description: — With the outcome still in doubt midway through the fourth quarter, and Buffalo facing third down at midfield, Bills defensive tackle Jordan Phillips could sense it was Josh Allen's time.
headlines.shortLinkText: Josh Allen combines for 3 TDs and Bills improve to 4-0 with 31-19 victory over winless Saints

headlines.description: — Jared Goff's connection with Amon-Ra St. Brown is so good, it helped the Detroit Lions overcome a relatively lackluster game on offense to rout the <a...
headlines.shortLinkText: Goff throws 2 TD passes to St. Brown, Lions beat Browns 34-10 for 3rd straight victory

events.name: Carolina Panthers at New England Patriots

headlines.description: — Almost nothing went right for the New England Patriots during their loss to Pittsburgh last week.
headlines.shortLinkText: Marcus Jones' 87-yard punt return TD sparks Patriots offense in 42-13 romp over Panthers

events.name: Los Angeles Chargers at New York Giants

headlines.description: — Brian Daboll found a grinning Jaxson Dart on the field after the New York Giants' first victory of the season, hugged the rookie quarterback around his neck and then giving him a big slap on the chest.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dart's impressive debut leads Giants to 1st win over Chargers, but await word on Nabers' injury

events.name: Philadelphia Eagles at Tampa Bay Buccaneers

headlines.description: — The Philadelphia Eagles don't need a tush push when the fake is even more effective.
headlines.shortLinkText: Fake tush push and special teams TD help Eagles beat Bucs 31-25 to stay undefeated

headlines.description: — Houston's defense got its first shutout in almost 15 years and the offense did the rest Sunday against the Tennessee Titans to give the Texans their first win of the season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Texans dominate Titans 26-0 for first win of the season

events.name: Indianapolis Colts at Los Angeles Rams

headlines.description: — Tutu Atwell hasn't received many opportunities to make big plays in his five seasons with the Los Angeles Rams. He knew he finally had a chance Sunday when he looked over his shoulder to see Matthew Stafford's perfect spiral sailing toward him, and...
headlines.shortLinkText: Tutu Atwell makes a late 88-yard TD catch, and Rams rally past Colts 27-20 after Mitchell's fumble

headlines.description: — With the way the defense and special teams are playing for Jacksonville in the opening month of the season, the Jaguars are able to keep pulling out wins even if Trevor Lawrence and the offense aren't yet operating at peak efficiency.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jaguars beat 49ers 26-21 with Washington's punt return TD, 4 takeaways

events.name: Baltimore Ravens at Kansas City Chiefs

headlines.description: — The Kansas City Chiefs are getting healthier, deeper and more dynamic as the season presses on.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mahomes shines for Chiefs, Jackson adds to Ravens' injury woes as Kansas City rolls to 37-20 victory

events.name: Chicago Bears at Las Vegas Raiders

headlines.description: — In the end, the Bears' win over the Raiders came down to Josh Blackwell getting a hand on a field-goal attempt.
headlines.shortLinkText: Josh Blackwell blocks field goal to preserve Bears' rally for 25-24 win over Raiders

events.name: Green Bay Packers at Dallas Cowboys

headlines.description: — Micah Parsons and Dak Prescott both said winning was the only thing that mattered in the Green Bay pass rusher's hyped return to Dallas to face...
headlines.shortLinkText: Micah Parsons' hyped return to Dallas ends with Cowboys and Packers in 40-40 tie
